title: wsj-br/transrewrt

Supports OpenRouter, OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, DeepSeek, Groq, Mistral, xAI, Ollama, and more. Runs as an Electron app (Windows/Linux) or a self-hosted Docker web app (amd64/arm64).

title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
